name: Fruit Pizza
recipeIngredient: Assorted Fruit: strawberries, bananas, grapes, cherries, pineapple, raspberries, peaches, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg, baking soda, and salt; mix well.
3. Gradually add flour and stir until combined.
4. Pour batter into a 14-inch pizza pan and bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and pineapple juice in a bowl.
7. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled crust.
8. Arrange the assorted fruit on top of the filling.
9. Heat the fruit juice until boiling, then stir in cornstarch until smooth.
10. Pour the thickened mixture over the fruit.
Note: Avoid aggressive culinary slang and ensure safety when handling hot ingredients.
